summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. Fixed critical NL translation bug - contact form labels were broken (showing only '*' instead of 'Voornaam/Achternaam'). All form labels now correctly translated in DE/EN/NL for both contact and booking forms. Chat markdown rendering working correctly. All 40 backend tests passed. Admin panel fully functional.
passed_tests: Contact form labels DE: VORNAME/NACHNAME/E-MAIL/TELEFON/UNTERNEHMEN/IHRE NACHRICHT ✓
Contact form labels EN: FIRST NAME/LAST NAME/EMAIL/PHONE/COMPANY/YOUR MESSAGE ✓
Contact form labels NL: VOORNAAM/ACHTERNAAM/E-MAIL/TELEFOON/BEDRIJF/UW BERICHT ✓ (FIXED)
Booking form labels DE: VORNAME/NACHNAME/E-MAIL/TELEFON/UNTERNEHMEN ✓
Booking form labels EN: FIRST NAME/LAST NAME/EMAIL/PHONE/COMPANY ✓
Booking form labels NL: VOORNAAM/ACHTERNAAM/E-MAIL/TELEFOON/BEDRIJF ✓
Contact form validation: separate errors for Vorname and Nachname ✓
Contact form submission works end-to-end ✓
Booking flow works (date->time->form) ✓
Chat markdown rendering: bold text renders as <strong> ✓
Chat markdown rendering: bullet points render as <li> ✓
Chat markdown rendering: no raw ** markers visible ✓
Chat system prompt quality: structured responses with pricing tiers ✓
Language switching DE/EN/NL works across all sections ✓
Admin login works with correct credentials ✓
Admin dashboard shows stats cards ✓
Admin calendar view works with monthly grid ✓
Admin customers list works (7 customers shown) ✓
Mobile responsive layout ✓
Mobile chat is full-screen (390x844) ✓
All 28 admin calendar tests passed ✓
All 12 chat markdown tests passed ✓

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: NL contact form translations used old 'name' key instead of 'firstName'/'lastName'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Updated NL contact.form to use firstName:'Voornaam', lastName:'Achternaam', phone:'Telefoon' and validation.firstName/lastName

critical_code_review_comments: NL translations were incomplete - contact form still used old 'name' key while DE/EN were updated to firstName/lastName
All form labels now properly use translation keys: t.contact.form.firstName, t.contact.form.lastName, t.contact.form.phone
Booking form labels correctly use t.booking.firstName, t.booking.lastName, t.booking.phone
Chat markdown rendering with ReactMarkdown + remark-gfm working correctly

test_credentials.note: Password stored in backend/.env as ADMIN_PASSWORD

seed_data_creation: Test contact form submissions and chat sessions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 fixed NL contact form translations. All form labels now correctly translated in DE/EN/NL. Key translation keys: contact.form.firstName, contact.form.lastName, contact.form.phone for contact form; booking.firstName, booking.lastName, booking.phone for booking form. Chat markdown rendering working with ReactMarkdown + remark-gfm. Admin panel fully functional. Cookie banner may block interactions - dismiss first.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - Chat uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM key, Email via Resend

features_verified.contact_validation: Separate errors for Vorname and Nachname
features_verified.chat_markdown: Bold, bullets render correctly, no raw ** markers
features_verified.language_switching: DE/EN/NL all working with proper translations
features_verified.admin_panel: Login, dashboard, calendar, customers all working
